languages.text: "Видоизмененный сслит, кто-то из его сородичей-друкари... а также химера, созданная из человека, точная конструкция которой пока остается загадкой для меня. Когда вы подошли, я как раз обдумывал методы воссоздания многокомпонентных {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}сервиторов{/g} подобного рода. Тервантьяс лишил меня всех привычных инструментов, кроме способности размышлять... и логировать размышления". {n}Землисто-бледное лицо Эоганна улыбается вам.{/n} "Надеюсь, следующие образцы будут более... творческими. Мне удалось разбудить в экспериментаторе некое подобие профессиональной ревности".

traits.locale_text: "Видоизмененный сслит, искаженный человек... а также химера, точная конструкция которой пока остается загадкой для меня. Когда вы подошли, Лорд-капитан, я как раз обдумывал методы воссоздания многокомпонентных {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}сервиторов{/g} подобного рода. Тервантьяс лишил меня всех привычных инструментов, кроме способности размышлять... и логгировать размышления". {n}Землисто-бледное лицо Эо-ганна улыбается вам. {/n} "Надеюсь, следующие образцы будут более... творческими. Мне удалось разбудить в экспериментаторе некое подобие профессиональной ревности".
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: "A modified Sslyth, one of his Drukhari kin... and a chimera created from a human, the exact construction of which remains a mystery to me for now. When you arrived, I was contemplating methods of recreating multi-component {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} of this kind. Tervantias has deprived me of all my usual tools, except the ability to think... and to log my thoughts." {n}Eogunn's pallid face curls into a smile at you.{/n} "I hope the next specimens will be more... inventive. I have managed to awaken in the experimenter a certain semblance of professional jealousy."
languages.original_text: "Видоизмененный сслит, кто-то из его сородичей-друкари... а также химера, созданная из человека, точная конструкция которой пока остается загадкой для меня. Когда вы подошли, я как раз обдумывал методы воссоздания многокомпонентных {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}сервиторов{/g} подобного рода. Тервантьяс лишил меня всех привычных инструментов, кроме способности размышлять... и логировать размышления". {n}Землисто-бледное лицо Эоганна улыбается вам.{/n} "Надеюсь, следующие образцы будут более... творческими. Мне удалось разбудить в экспериментаторе некое подобие профессиональной ревности".

languages.text: "Ein modifizierter Sslyth, einer seiner Drukhari-Artgenossen ... und eine aus einem Menschen geschaffene Chimäre, deren exakte Konstruktion mir derzeit noch ein Rätsel ist.. Bei Eurer Ankunft grübelte ich gerade an Methoden, aus mehreren Komponenten bestehende {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}Servitoren{/g} dieser Art nachzubauen. Tervantias hat mich aller meiner üblichen Werkzeuge beraubt, mit Ausnahme meiner Fähigkeit, zu denken ... und meine Gedanken zu protokollieren." {n}Eogunn verzieht sein bleiches Gesicht zu einem Lächeln.{/n} "Ich hoffe, die nächsten Versuchsstücke sind … einfallsreicher. Es ist mir gelungen, in dem Experimentator eine gewisse professionelle Eifersucht zu wecken."
languages.original_text: "A modified Sslyth, one of his Drukhari kin... and a chimera created from a human, the exact construction of which remains a mystery to me for now. When you arrived, I was contemplating methods of recreating multi-component {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} of this kind. Bei Eurer Ankunft grübelte ich gerade an Methoden, aus mehreren Komponenten bestehende {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}Servitoren{/g} dieser Art nachzubauen. Tervantias hat mich aller meiner üblichen Werkzeuge beraubt, mit Ausnahme meiner Fähigkeit, zu denken ... und meine Gedanken zu protokollieren." {n}Eogunn verzieht sein bleiches Gesicht zu einem Lächeln.{/n} "Ich hoffe, die nächsten Versuchsstücke sind … einfallsreicher. Es ist mir gelungen, in dem Experimentator eine gewisse professionelle Eifersucht zu wecken."

languages.text: « À un Sslyth modifié, un de ses frères drukhari... et une chimère conçue à partir d'humains, dont la composition m'est encore inconnue. Avant votre arrivée, j'étais moi-même en train de songer aux différentes méthodes qui permettraient de recréer des {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} à multicomposants dans ce genre. Tervantias m'a privé de tous mes outils habituels, hormis mon esprit et ma capacité à consigner mes pensées... {n}Eogunn se tourne vers vous et tente d'esquisser un sourire avant de reprendre.{/n} J'espère que les prochains spécimens seront plus... inventifs. J'ai réussi à éveiller un certain semblant de... jalousie professionnelle chez cet expérimentateur. »
languages.original_text: "A modified Sslyth, one of his Drukhari kin... and a chimera created from a human, the exact construction of which remains a mystery to me for now. When you arrived, I was contemplating methods of recreating multi-component {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} of this kind. Tervantias has deprived me of all my usual tools, except the ability to think... and to log my thoughts." {n}Eogunn's pallid face curls into a smile at you.{/n} "I hope the next specimens will be more... inventive. I have managed to awaken in the experimenter a certain semblance of professional jealousy."

traits.locale_text: « À un Sslyth modifié, un de ses frères drukhari... et une chimère conçue à partir d'humains, dont la composition m'est encore inconnue. Avant votre arrivée, j'étais moi-même en train de songer aux différentes méthodes qui permettraient de recréer des {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} à multicomposants dans ce genre. Tervantias m'a privé de tous mes outils habituels, hormis mon esprit et ma capacité à consigner mes pensées... {n}Eogunn se tourne vers vous et tente d'esquisser un sourire avant de reprendre.{/n} J'espère que les prochains spécimens seront plus... inventifs. J'ai réussi à éveiller un certain semblant de... jalousie professionnelle chez cet expérimentateur. »

languages.text: «Un Sslyth modificado, un Drukhari de su misma índole... y una quimera creada a partir de un ser humano cuya construcción exacta no he logrado discernir todavía. Cuando ha llegado, estaba pensando en la metodología para crear {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servidores{/g} multicomponente como ese. Tervantias me ha arrebatado todas mis herramientas, excepto la capacidad de pensar... y de registrar mis pensamientos». {n}El pálido rostro de Eogunn logra esbozar una sonrisa.{/n} «Espero que los siguientes especímenes sean más... creativos. He logrado inducir en el experimentador un cierto nivel de envidia profesional».
languages.original_text: "A modified Sslyth, one of his Drukhari kin... and a chimera created from a human, the exact construction of which remains a mystery to me for now. When you arrived, I was contemplating methods of recreating multi-component {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} of this kind. Tervantias has deprived me of all my usual tools, except the ability to think... and to log my thoughts." {n}Eogunn's pallid face curls into a smile at you.{/n} "I hope the next specimens will be more... inventive. I have managed to awaken in the experimenter a certain semblance of professional jealousy."

traits.locale_text: «Un Sslyth modificado, un Drukhari de su misma índole... y una quimera creada a partir de un ser humano cuya construcción exacta no he logrado discernir todavía. Cuando ha llegado, estaba pensando en la metodología para crear {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servidores{/g} multicomponente como ese. Tervantias me ha arrebatado todas mis herramientas, excepto la capacidad de pensar... y de registrar mis pensamientos». {n}El pálido rostro de Eogunn logra esbozar una sonrisa.{/n} «Espero que los siguientes especímenes sean más... creativos. He logrado inducir en el experimentador un cierto nivel de envidia profesional».

languages.text: "Drukhari soydaşlarından değiştirilmiş bir Sslyth... Bir de bir insandan yaratılmış bir kimera var ki tam yapısı, şimdilik benim için gizemini korumaya devam ediyor. Siz geldiğinizde bu türden çok bileşenli {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}hizmetörleri{/g} yeniden yaratma yöntemlerini tasarlıyordum. Tervantias, düşünme... Ve düşüncelerimi kaydetme yeteneğim dışında her zamanki tüm aletlerimden mahrum bıraktı beni." {n}Eogunn'un sana bakan solgun yüzünden bir gülümseme beliriyor.{/n} "Umarım sonraki numuneler daha... Yaratıcı olur. Deneyi yapanda mesleki kıskançlığa benzer bir şey uyandırmayı başardım."
languages.original_text: "A modified Sslyth, one of his Drukhari kin... and a chimera created from a human, the exact construction of which remains a mystery to me for now. When you arrived, I was contemplating methods of recreating multi-component {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} of this kind. Tervantias has deprived me of all my usual tools, except the ability to think... and to log my thoughts." {n}Eogunn's pallid face curls into a smile at you.{/n} "I hope the next specimens will be more... inventive. I have managed to awaken in the experimenter a certain semblance of professional jealousy."

traits.locale_text: "Drukhari soydaşlarından değiştirilmiş bir Sslyth... Bir de bir insandan yaratılmış bir kimera var ki tam yapısı, şimdilik benim için gizemini korumaya devam ediyor. Siz geldiğinizde bu türden çok bileşenli {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}hizmetörleri{/g} yeniden yaratma yöntemlerini tasarlıyordum. Tervantias, düşünme... Ve düşüncelerimi kaydetme yeteneğim dışında her zamanki tüm aletlerimden mahrum bıraktı beni." {n}Eogunn'un sana bakan solgun yüzünden bir gülümseme beliriyor.{/n} "Umarım sonraki numuneler daha... Yaratıcı olur. Deneyi yapanda mesleki kıskançlığa benzer bir şey uyandırmayı başardım."

languages.text: “一个改造过的蛇人，他的黑暗灵族同类……还有一个由人类改造而成的奇美拉，其具体构造我目前还没参透。你们来之前，我正在思考如何复现这种多部件结构的{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}机仆{/g}。特万提亚斯夺走了我所有惯用的工具，只留下思考的能力……以及记录我思考的能力。”{n}伊奥贡那张惨白的脸冲你挤出一丝笑容。{/n}“我希望下一批样本能……更有创意。我已经成功在那位实验者心中激起了几分职业上的妒忌心。”
languages.original_text: "A modified Sslyth, one of his Drukhari kin... and a chimera created from a human, the exact construction of which remains a mystery to me for now. When you arrived, I was contemplating methods of recreating multi-component {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} of this kind. Tervantias has deprived me of all my usual tools, except the ability to think... and to log my thoughts." {n}Eogunn's pallid face curls into a smile at you.{/n} "I hope the next specimens will be more... inventive. I have managed to awaken in the experimenter a certain semblance of professional jealousy."

traits.locale_text: “一个改造过的蛇人，他的黑暗灵族同类……还有一个由人类改造而成的奇美拉，其具体构造我目前还没参透。你们来之前，我正在思考如何复现这种多部件结构的{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}机仆{/g}。特万提亚斯夺走了我所有惯用的工具，只留下思考的能力……以及记录我思考的能力。”{n}伊奥贡那张惨白的脸冲你挤出一丝笑容。{/n}“我希望下一批样本能……更有创意。我已经成功在那位实验者心中激起了几分职业上的妒忌心。”

languages.text: 「改造されたスリス――彼のドルカリの同族の一体です……それと、人間から作り出されたキメラ。その正確な構造は、今の私にはなお謎のままです。あなたが現れたとき、私はこの種の多成分{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}サーヴィター{/g}を再現する方法を思案していました。テルヴァンティアスは、思考する能力……そして思考を記録する能力を除き、私のいつもの道具をことごとく奪い去りました」{n}エオガンの青ざめた顔が、あなたに向かって笑みの形にゆがむ。{/n}「次の標本が、もっと……独創的であることを願います。私は実験者の内に、職業的嫉妬のようなものを呼び覚ますことに成功したのですから」
languages.original_text: "A modified Sslyth, one of his Drukhari kin... and a chimera created from a human, the exact construction of which remains a mystery to me for now. When you arrived, I was contemplating methods of recreating multi-component {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitors{/g} of this kind. Tervantias has deprived me of all my usual tools, except the ability to think... and to log my thoughts." {n}Eogunn's pallid face curls into a smile at you.{/n} "I hope the next specimens will be more... inventive. I have managed to awaken in the experimenter a certain semblance of professional jealousy."
